title: GREECE enforcement action against Vodafone – PANAFON A.E.E.T. (30,000)
summary: Insufficient fulfilment of data subjects rights The Greek DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 30,000 on Vodafone – PANAFON A.E.E.T. The controller failed to handle a data subject's requests to exercise her rights. Specifically, a data subject requested access to call recordings relating to them, but the controller only partially fulfilled this...
dedupKey: greece enforcement action against vodafone panafon a e e t 30 000|2026-02-11
